subcodes.first_line: The paradise of the tongue is the mention of the All-Merciful, and the paradise of the heart is His love. The friends of God must, if God willeth, to the horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جنت لسان ذکر رحمن است و جنت قلب حب او انشاء الله باید دوستان الهی که بافق
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @purpose; goal of creation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement
